channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Why couldn’t the coffee bean go out to play?
item.description:
Why couldn’t the coffee bean go out to play?
He was grounded.

item.title: Diner: Is there any stew on the menu?
item.description:
Diner: Is there any stew on the menu?
Waiter: There was, but I wiped it off.

item.title: What’s more useful after it’s broken?
item.description:
What’s more useful after it’s broken?
An egg.

item.title: How many items can you put into an empty grocery bag?
item.description:
How many items can you put into an empty grocery bag?
One. After that, the bag isn’t empty anymore.

item.title: Was Noah the first one out of the ark?
item.description:
Was Noah the first one out of the ark?
No; he came forth out of the ark.

item.title: When is the first tennis match mentioned in the Bible?
item.description:
When is the first tennis match mentioned in the Bible?
When Joseph served in Pharaoh’s court.

item.title: Who was the greatest female financier in the Bible?
item.description:
Who was the greatest female financier in the Bible?
Pharaoh’s daughter; she went down to the bank of the Nile and drew out a little prophet.

item.title: Why didn’t Noah fish very often?
item.description:
Why didn’t Noah fish very often?
He only had two worms.

item.title: How did Jonah feel when the whale swallowed him?
item.description:
How did Jonah feel when the whale swallowed him?
Down in the mouth.

item.title: Why didn’t they play cards on Noah’s ark?
item.description:
Why didn’t they play cards on Noah’s ark?
Because Noah sat on the deck.
